# ContestOps AI Judge Scorecard

Overall competitive score: 81/100

| Dimension | Score | Weight | Evidence | Gap |
|---|---:|---:|---|---|
| Team Strength | 72 | 20 | `docs/ELIGIBILITY_CHECKLIST.md and secure founder profiles` | Add two named founder profiles, commitment, and Paris attendance. |
| Product Distinctiveness | 91 | 25 | `docs/COMPETITIVE_BATTLECARD.md and demo panel` | Show a live user-selected opportunity run in the video. |
| Traction Or Validation | 68 | 25 | `docs/TRACTION_PROOF_MINIMUM.md` | Collect five conversations, two written validations, and one paid or LOI signal. |
| Opportunity Scale | 90 | 15 | `docs/JUDGING_SCORECARD.md` | Quantify reachable wedge: founders, accelerators, grants, hackathons, and RFPs. |
| AI Depth | 88 | 10 | `V core, scorecard renderer, generated payloads, WAIBAv traces` | Capture one env-backed model call and one live automation draft session. |
| Application Completeness | 94 | 5 | `submission/dealum_payload.json and submission/dealum_form_map.yml` | Replace secure_input_required placeholders inside Dealum. |

## Competitor Battlecard

| Archetype | Threat | Strength | Counter |
|---|---:|---|---|
| Startup portals | 78 | Distribution, profiles, program discovery, investor workflows. | Complement Dealum/F6S by preparing the founder to submit stronger applications everywhere. |
| Grant and RFP platforms | 86 | Clear ROI, proposal workflows, compliance matrices, buyer budget. | Own the broader founder application-ops wedge: contests, accelerators, grants, RFPs, and MVP evidence. |
| Proposal writers | 74 | Fast drafting and easy before/after demo. | Show the full lifecycle from source to payload to automation receipt. |
| Generic browser agents | 82 | Broad automation narrative and impressive demos. | Use domain-specific scoring, private/public evidence boundaries, and final-submit gates. |
| Consultants and agencies | 70 | Trust, expertise, and white-glove review. | Productize repeatable execution and leave experts for final judgment. |

## Highest-Leverage Next Moves

- Run a 72-hour proof sprint with 20 targets, 5 conversations, 2 validations, and 1 paid or LOI signal.
- Record a judge-demo video that starts with the RAISE deadline and ends with Dealum payload readiness.
- Generate one packet for a user-selected opportunity to prove this is not hand-authored for RAISE.
- Publish redacted before/after time saved and missing-evidence detection metrics.
- Add founder legal/team/funding secure inputs directly in Dealum before final submit.
